tool.name: WGCNA: Soft-Thresholding Power
tool.description: Estimate the soft-thresholding power for WGCNA network construction

configfiles.configfile: counts_file = $counts_file network_type = $network_type corFnc = $corFnc log_transform = $log_transform filter_by_variance = $filter_by_variance variance_quantile = $variance_quantile softpower_plot = plots/soft_thresholding.png softpower_config = softpower_config.txt softpower_fit_indices = softpower_fit_indices.tsv

library(WGCNA) options(stringsAsFactors = FALSE)
cfg <- read.delim("config.txt", header = FALSE, sep = "=", strip.white = TRUE, stringsAsFactors = FALSE) cfg_list <- setNames(trimws(cfg[, 2]), trimws(cfg[, 1]))
counts_file <- cfg_list[["counts_file"]] network_type <- trimws(cfg_list[["network_type"]]) corFnc <- trimws(cfg_list[["corFnc"]]) log_transform <- cfg_list[["log_transform"]] == "true" filter_by_variance <- cfg_list[["filter_by_variance"]] == "true" variance_quantile <- as.numeric(cfg_list[["variance_quantile"]]) output_plot <- cfg_list[["softpower_plot"]] output_config <- cfg_list[["softpower_config"]] output_fit_indices <- cfg_list[["softpower_fit_indices"]]
counts <- read.delim(counts_file, check.names = FALSE, row.names = 1)
expr_data <- as.matrix(counts) mode(expr_data) <- "numeric"
if (log_transform) { expr_data <- log2(expr_data + 1) }
if (any(is.na(expr_data))) { expr_data <- expr_data[complete.cases(expr_data), , drop = FALSE] }
if (filter_by_variance) { gene_variances <- apply(expr_data, 1, var, na.rm = TRUE) gene_variances[!is.finite(gene_variances)] <- NA_real_ valid_var <- gene_variances[is.finite(gene_variances)]
if (length(valid_var) == 0) { warning("No finite gene variances found; skipping variance filtering.") filtered_expr_data <- expr_data } else { variance_threshold <- quantile(valid_var, variance_quantile, na.rm = TRUE) filtered_expr_data <- expr_data[gene_variances > variance_threshold, , drop = FALSE]
if (nrow(filtered_expr_data) == 0) { warning("Variance filter removed all genes; using unfiltered matrix.") filtered_expr_data <- expr_data } } } else { filtered_expr_data <- expr_data }
datExpr <- t(filtered_expr_data) if (nrow(datExpr) < 2 || ncol(datExpr) < 2) { stop("Too few samples/genes to run pickSoftThreshold after preprocessing.") }
try(enableWGCNAThreads(), silent = TRUE)
powers <- c(seq(1, 10, by = 1), seq(12, 20, by = 2))
sft <- pickSoftThreshold( datExpr, powerVector = powers, networkType = network_type, corFnc = get(corFnc), verbose = 3 )
png(output_plot, width = 1200, height = 600, res = 100) par(mfrow = c(1, 2))
plot( sft$fitIndices[, 1], -sign(sft$fitIndices[, 3]) * sft$fitIndices[, 2], type = "n", xlab = "Soft Threshold (power)", ylab = "Scale Free Topology Model Fit, signed R^2", main = "Scale Independence" ) text( sft$fitIndices[, 1], -sign(sft$fitIndices[, 3]) * sft$fitIndices[, 2], labels = sft$fitIndices[, 1], cex = 0.9, col = "red" ) abline(h = 0.85, col = "blue", lty = 2)
plot( sft$fitIndices[, 1], sft$fitIndices[, 5], type = "n", xlab = "Soft Threshold (power)", ylab = "Mean Connectivity", main = "Mean Connectivity" ) text( sft$fitIndices[, 1], sft$fitIndices[, 5], labels = sft$fitIndices[, 1], cex = 0.9, col = "red" )
dev.off()
soft_power <- sft$powerEstimate if (is.na(soft_power)) { soft_power <- 6 cat("No suitable power found. Defaulting to power = 6.\n") } else { cat("Chosen soft-thresholding power:", soft_power, "\n") }
writeLines( c( paste0("soft_power = ", soft_power), paste0("network_type = ", network_type), paste0("variance_quantile = ", variance_quantile) ), output_config )
write.table( sft$fitIndices, file = output_fit_indices, sep = "\t", quote = FALSE, row.names = FALSE )
cat("Selected soft power:", soft_power, "\n") cat("Fit indices table written to:", output_fit_indices, "\n")

param.name: counts_file
param.label: Counts matrix
param.help: Genes as rows and samples as columns. First column contains gene identifiers.

tool.help:
**WGCNA Soft-Thresholding Power Estimation**
Runs ``pickSoftThreshold`` from WGCNA to estimate an appropriate soft-thresholding power for weighted co-expression network construction.
